description: Unauthorized access to enterprise document storage — attacker exploited SSRF vulnerability to access internal S3 buckets containing customer documents
Compromised employee credentials — Okta detected impossible travel login from Lagos and Chicago within 20 minutes
API rate limiting bypass — customer tenant isolation violated allowing cross-tenant document listing
Ransomware on file processing cluster — Conti variant detected by CrowdStrike on 3 processing nodes
Unauthorized database query — former contractor's VPN credentials used to access analytics database 14 days after contract termination
DDoS attack on collaboration API — 4.5M requests/second from botnet targeting real-time sync endpoints
Suspicious outbound DNS queries from staging server — investigation confirmed misconfigured monitoring agent
